description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests to the master branch, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: build-ubuntu and build-windows. The build-ubuntu job runs on multiple Ubuntu environments with different configurations, installing dependencies, configuring CMake, and building the project. The build-windows job runs on a Windows Server 2019 environment, installing dependencies, configuring CMake, and building the project.
